note: 8 /llms/battles/<slug>.md sitemap entries already present in api/sitemap.js lines 620-635 (first applied commit d5d6cc9). All 8 public/llms/battles/ files confirmed. Syntax OK. No changes needed.
body:
## Problem

public/llms/battles/ contains 8 per-matchup LLM markdown files (shipped as part of #1476), but these URLs have zero entries in api/sitemap.js. AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) follow the sitemap for discovery — these 8 pages are invisible to them.

Confirmed by: ls public/llms/battles/ — 8 files exist:
- brann-dailor-vs-chris-adler.md
- danny-carey-vs-mike-portnoy.md
- gene-hoglan-vs-george-kollias.md
- inferno-vs-hellhammer.md
- joey-jordison-vs-eloy-casagrande.md
- lars-ulrich-vs-dave-lombardo.md
- tomas-haake-vs-mario-duplantier.md
- vinnie-paul-vs-dave-lombardo.md

Sitemap grep: grep 'llms/battles' api/sitemap.js shows zero results. The /llms/vs/ pattern (line 563 of api/sitemap.js) correctly maps all comparison slugs using getAllDrummerComparisonSlugs() — battles need the same treatment with a hardcoded array.

## Fix

File: api/sitemap.js

Add a battles LLM array after the /llms/vs/ block (around line 567):

const BATTLES_LLM_SLUGS = [
  'brann-dailor-vs-chris-adler',
  'danny-carey-vs-mike-portnoy',
  'gene-hoglan-vs-george-kollias',
  'inferno-vs-hellhammer',
  'joey-jordison-vs-eloy-casagrande',
  'lars-ulrich-vs-dave-lombardo',
  'tomas-haake-vs-mario-duplantier',
  'vinnie-paul-vs-dave-lombardo',
];

...BATTLES_LLM_SLUGS.map(slug => ({
  loc: '/llms/battles/' + slug + '.md',
  priority: '0.5',
  changefreq: 'monthly',
})),

## Pages affected
- 8 existing static files in public/llms/battles/ now discoverable via sitemap
- No new files needed — only api/sitemap.js changes

## Estimated uplift
Completes the battles AI-citation surface. AI assistants answering 'who would win in a drum battle, Lars Ulrich vs Dave Lombardo?' can now crawl MetalForge battles content.

## GSC query bucket served
'[drummer] vs [drummer] drums', 'who is a better drummer [X] or [Y]' — AI Overview long-tail.

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'llms/battles' returns 8 URL entries
2. All 8 /llms/battles/<slug>.md return HTTP 200
3. Sitemap validates at https://www.xml-sitemaps.com/
4. grep 'llms/battles' api/sitemap.js shows 8 entries

## Done
8 /llms/battles/<slug>.md URL entries added to api/sitemap.js.
title: SEO: /llms/battles/ — 8 per-matchup LLM files exist but absent from sitemap (AI crawlers blind)
